title: Blossom Blade Fabric
description: Adds a blossom sword, which deals extra damage to nether mobs
body:
I took some inspiration and made a Fabric mod which adds: 
-**Blossom Sword**
-Blossom Sword Structure
-mossy chiseled stone brick

 You can only find the specially enchanted **Blossom Sword** stuck in a stone in a cherry blossom biome. The **Blossom Sword** deals extra damage to mobs in the Nether.
